name: Tech News Analysis Workflow
description: Search for latest tech news headlines, classify sentiment and sector, and save as JSON

tasks.name: Search Latest Tech News
tasks.description: You MUST call web_search with query 'latest tech news headlines 2026'. Output the FULL raw search results verbatim (URLs, titles, snippets). Do NOT summarize as 'results were found' — downstream tasks need the actual data. Extract the top 5 most recent headlines. Output format: JSON array of {title, url, snippet} objects.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains a JSON array with at least 5 tech news headlines, each having title, url, and snippet fields with actual URLs starting with https://

tasks.name: Classify Headlines
tasks.description: For each of the 5 headlines from task_001's output, classify: (1) sentiment as one of: positive, negative, neutral, (2) tech sector as one of: AI, hardware, software, crypto, other. Base your classification on the headline text and snippet content from task_001. Output a JSON array with structure: [{"headline": "...", "url": "...", "sentiment": "...", "sector": "..."}]. Do NOT invent headlines — only use the exact headlines from task_001's output. Preserve the original URLs.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains a valid JSON array with exactly 5 objects, each having headline, url, sentiment (positive/negative/neutral), and sector (AI/hardware/software/crypto/other) fields, with URLs matching task_001's output

tasks.name: Write Results to File
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to save the classified results from task_002 to a file named 'tech_news_analysis.json'. Write the complete JSON array from task_002's output without any modification. The file content must be valid JSON that can be parsed.
tasks.success_criteria: Successfully called file_write with filename 'tech_news_analysis.json' and content is the JSON array from task_002 containing 5 classified headlines

metadata.goal: Search web for latest tech news, classify sentiment and sector, write to JSON file
